title: ACDP Context
description: The full retrieval shape of an ACDP context: an immutable signed body plus the registry's mutable state. Returned by GET /contexts/{ctx_id}.

body.description: The immutable Body. ProducerContent (body minus content_hash, signature, and registry-assigned fields) is end-to-end verifiable via the producer's signature. Registry-assigned identity fields (ctx_id, lineage_id, origin_registry, created_at) rely on registry honesty in v0.0.1.

registry_state.description: The registry-maintained state. In v0.0.1 contains only the derived 'status' field.

$comment: additionalProperties is true so future top-level keys (e.g. registry_receipt per RFC-ACDP-0009 §2.7) can be added without a schema bump. v0.0.1 consumers MUST tolerate unknown top-level keys.
